allow: Bash(timeout 40 node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const dns=require\('dns'\); dns.setServers\(['8.8.8.8','1.1.1.1']\); const m=require\('mongoose'\); m.connect\(process.env.MONGO_URI\).then\(c=>{console.log\('OK:',c.connection.host\);process.exit\(0\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\('FAIL:',e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")
